home.subtitle: Your knowledge workspace is ready. What would you like to work on?

search.title: Search
search.emptyHint: Search across your projects, chats, notebooks, and notes
search.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to start
search.noResultsHint: Try a different search term or filter

projectsLanding.title: My Projects
projectsLanding.intro: Create a project to organize your documents, build a knowledge base, and get grounded answers.

documentAnalysis.title: Document Analysis
documentAnalysis.description: Query across all your uploaded documents

instantAnswers.title: Instant Answers
instantAnswers.description: Get accurate responses with source-aware retrieval

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data stays inside your workspace and project context

manage.title: Manage Project
manage.description: Update your project details. The description helps the AI provide better answers.
manage.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this project is about...
manage.descriptionHint: This helps the AI understand the project context and provide better answers.

delete.title: Delete Project
delete.intro: This will permanently delete this project and all of its data, including:

items.extracted: All extracted text, summaries, and processed data

delete.success: Project and all its data deleted

notebooksLanding.title: My Notebooks
notebooksLanding.intro: Create a notebook to organize your research, collect sources, and explore topics with AI-powered analysis.

create.title: Create Notebook
create.description: Give your notebook a name and optional description.

manage.title: Manage Notebook
manage.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this notebook is about...
manage.descriptionHint: This helps the AI understand the notebook context and provide better answers.

delete.title: Delete Notebook
delete.intro: This will permanently delete this notebook and all of its data, including:

items.extracted: All extracted text, summaries, and processed data

delete.success: Notebook and all its data deleted

starred.title: Starred
starred.description: Your starred projects, notebooks, and chats will appear here. Star important items to access them quickly.

sharedLanding.title: Shared with me
sharedLanding.subtitle: Projects and notebooks shared by your collaborators

empty.title: Shared with me
empty.intro: Projects and notebooks shared with you will appear here.
empty.hint: When collaborators share their projects or notebooks with you, you'll be able to access them from this dashboard.

emptySources.title: Add a source to get started
emptySources.description: Upload a document or add a website URL to begin asking questions.
emptySources.hint: No sources added yet. Check the Sources panel on the left.

empty.title: No sources yet
empty.description: Upload documents or attach videos to start asking questions

empty.title: No notes yet
empty.description: Save insights from chat or create your own note.

toasts.savedFromChat: Saved to notes — you can edit it now
toasts.addToSourcesFailed: Failed to add note to sources

permissions.createDenied: You do not have permission to create notes
permissions.editDenied: You do not have permission to edit notes
permissions.deleteDenied: You do not have permission to delete notes
permissions.manageSourcesDenied: You do not have permission to manage notebook sources

chat.askDescription: Use the chat to summarize, compare, extract insights, or explore ideas from your attached materials.
chat.readOnly: You have read-only access to this notebook.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Message
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete this question and its corresponding answer from the system and database. This action cannot be undone.

toasts.youtubeFailed: Failed to add video to sources

chat.welcomeMessage: Welcome! I can help you explore and work with the information in this project. You can upload files, build a knowledge base, ask questions about your documents, and get grounded answers based on the content available here. To get started, add files to this chat or project, then ask a question, request a summary, or explore key insights.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: All documents and resources across your projects and notebooks

documentAnalysis.title: Document Analysis
documentAnalysis.description: Query across all your uploaded documents

instantAnswers.title: Instant Answers
instantAnswers.description: Get accurate responses with source citations

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data stays within your workspace

projectDashboard.noChatsYet: No chats yet. Ask an editor or admin to create one.

noMessagesYet.title: No messages yet
noMessagesYet.description: Start the conversation by asking a question about your documents.

delete.title: Delete Chat
delete.intro: This will permanently delete this chat and all of its data, including:

items.extracted: All extracted text, summaries, and processed data

delete.success: Chat and all its data deleted

inbox.emptyDescription: Messages, workspace and project invitations will appear here

auth.resetPasswordSoon: Password reset will be available soon.
auth.googleFailed: Failed to sign in with Google

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.signInFailedRetry: Sign in failed. Please try again.

onboarding.heroDescription: Upload your files, build a searchable knowledge base, and get accurate answers powered by retrieval-augmented generation. Perfect for teams who need fast, reliable information retrieval.

upload.title: Upload & Index Documents
upload.description: Upload PDFs, Word files, and text documents. They're automatically indexed for fast, accurate retrieval.

knowledge.title: Multimodal Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Combine text, structured data, and multiple file formats into a centralized knowledge base per project.

rag.title: RAG-Powered Chat
rag.description: Ask questions in natural language. Responses are grounded in your uploaded content for improved accuracy.

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.description: Share projects with team members. Ensure consistent answers from a shared source of truth.

notebooks.title: Organize Insights with Notebooks
notebooks.description: Go beyond Q&A — structure your knowledge, capture findings, and build reusable research workflows.

build.title: Build Research Notebooks
build.description: Organize documents, questions, and sources into focused knowledge workspaces.

save.title: Save and Reuse Insights
save.description: Turn useful answers into notes, refine them, and add them back as reusable sources.

useCases.title: What You Can Do with Researcher
useCases.description: Practical ways to get value from your documents and knowledge.

research.title: Research & Analysis
research.description: Explore papers, reports, specifications, and long documents faster.

learning.title: Learning & Study
learning.description: Turn dense material into clear explanations, summaries, and study notes.

qa.title: Document Q&A
qa.description: Ask questions across your uploaded files and get grounded answers quickly.

organize.title: Knowledge Organization
organize.description: Build reusable notebooks, notes, and source-backed knowledge bases.
